messages.subject: [hp-r3i] Reserving packages/schemas
messages.body_md: Reserved packages/schemas/** for schema codegen work.

messages.subject: [hp-tjf] Please force-release reservation 144
messages.body_md: Reservation 144 is past TTL, AmberSky is absent from NTM, and packages/schemas/openapi.yaml is blocking hp-r3i. Please ask the coordinator to force-release it.

messages.subject: [hp-tjf] Coordinator force-released stale reservation 144
messages.body_md: Coordinator force-released Agent Mail reservation 144 after GreenBear requested help. Evidence: reservation expired at 2026-05-02T19:05:00Z, AmberSky is absent from NTM, and the postcondition confirms Agent Mail no longer reports the reservation.
